dsl_rule.translation_notes: Classic Moving Average Crossover strategy (MA(10) vs MA(20)). SMA1_period and SMA2_period were marked as THRESHOLD_NEEDED in the original signal; used sma_10 and sma_20 as reasonable defaults for a fast/slow pair. The source code references self.SMA1 and self.SMA2 but specific periods are not hardcoded in the provided excerpt. Entry and exit conditions use crosses_above/crosses_below operators to capture the crossover logic explicitly.

source_rule_text: Generate trading signals by comparing two moving averages of different periods; take long positions when the faster MA exceeds the slower MA, and short positions when it falls below.
